task_completion.description: Verify the invoice title and account name are entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'INV-2025-TFS-001' in the Title/Subject field and 'TechFlow Solutions' in the Account field.

task_completion.description: Verify the invoice date, due date, and status are set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for Invoice Date '01/15/2025' (or '2025-01-15'), Due Date '02/14/2025' (or '2025-02-14'), and Status set to 'Unpaid'.

task_completion.description: Verify the billing address is entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for '500 Technology Drive, San Jose, CA 95110, United States' in the Billing Address text area.

task_completion.description: Verify all three line items are added with correct quantities and unit prices.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for three distinct line items: 1. 'Enterprise CRM License' (Qty: 10, Price: 200.00), 2. 'Implementation Services' (Qty: 20, Price: 150.00), 3. 'Annual Support Package' (Qty: 1, Price: 1500.00).

task_completion.description: Verify the invoice is saved and the grand total is correct.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the saved invoice view (indicating the record was saved, not just in edit mode) showing a Grand Total of $6,500.00.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the SuiteCRM graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser interacting with the SuiteCRM web application, not a terminal or database client.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual CRM software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should be the genuine SuiteCRM application, not a text editor, mocked HTML page, or script execution.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no visible terminal windows executing SQL commands, curl requests, or python scripts to create the invoice.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Invoice Title: 'INV-2025-TFS-001'. Expected Account: 'TechFlow Solutions'. Expected Invoice Date: '01/15/2025' (or '2025-01-15'). Expected Due Date: '02/14/2025' (or '2025-02-14'). Expected Grand Total: $6500.00 (Tolerance: +/- $100.00).
